creator: TONY@ACNODES.COM
text:
Acnodes Rackmount computer & monitor

Acnodes Corporation provided FreeBSD and Linux-based computer for customers in the industrial control, automation industries, and military. Our rack mount computers, embedeed systems and Panel PCs are fully configurable and supports FreeBSD, Linux, or other operating systems.
Our product line include:

  • Rackmount computer(1U to 4U rack-mount ready computers, standard ATX or SBC systems)
  • Panel PC (panel mount ready touch screen computer )
  • Embedded system box (fan less all-in-one computer integrated into a rugged metal compact-size micro box)
  • Monitor keyboard drawer (space-saving 1U/2U control console, optional for Cat6, IP KVM switch)
  • Rackmount LCD monitor (rack-mount ready LCD monitor, up to 20-inch monitor)

Our product line configurations are illustrated on Acnodes.com. However, most of the commercial and industrial computers are custom built to your exact requirements. Contact us via e-mail or telephone to discover how we can give you the equipment you need for your specific needs.
